# Storage IP Port

**Status**: [Development][DocumentStatus]

This document defines semantic conventions for storage IP ports.

## Storage IP Port Entity

A storage IP port is a network interface on a storage system or node that provides
IP-based connectivity for protocols such as NFS, SMB, or iSCSI.

<!-- semconv entity.storage.ip_port -->

**Description:** A storage IP port is a network interface on a storage system or node that provides IP-based connectivity for protocols such as NFS, SMB, or iSCSI.

**Attributes:**

| Role | Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Identity | [`storage.ip_port.id`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the unique identifier of the IP port. | `0`; `1` |
| Description | [`storage.ip_port.gateway`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the IP gateway for the port. | `192.168.1.1` |
| Description | [`storage.ip_port.iqn`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the iSCSI qualified name of the port. | `iqn.1986-03.com.ibm:2145.h1ibmzzzfs5ksyb6607.node1` |
| Description | [`storage.ip_port.mac_address`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Specifies the MAC address of the IP port. | `00:1a:2b:3c:4d:5e`; `aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff` |
| Description | [`storage.ip_port.name`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The logical name of the IP port within the storage system. | `node1`; `Port 1`; `eth0` |
| Description | [`storage.ip_port.role`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the role assigned to the specific port. | `Host Attach`; `Storage Attach`; `Management` |
| Description | [`storage.ip_port.status`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the status of the specific port. | `active`; `inactive`; `down` |
| Description | [`storage.ip_port.subnet`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the IP subnet of the port. | `192.168.1.0/24` |
| Description | [`storage.node.id`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the unique identifier of the node in the cluster. | `1`; `2`; `node-0A1B2C3D` |
| Description | [`storage.ip_port.ip_address`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Opt-In` | string | Indicates the Internet Protocol Version 4 (IPv4) address of the port. [1] | `192.168.1.10`; `10.0.0.20` |
| Description | [`storage.ip_port.ip_address_6`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Opt-In` | string | Indicates the Internet Protocol Version 6 (IPv6) address of the port. [2] | `fe80::1`; `2001:db8::3` |

**[1] `storage.ip_port.ip_address`:** IPv4 addresses MUST be specified in dotted-quad notation.

**[2] `storage.ip_port.ip_address_6`:** IPv6 addresses MUST be specified in the RFC 5952 format.
